assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements under IFRS.
The recorded intragroup dividend gives rise to a recognised foreign-currency-denominated position or exposure.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 39 and IFRS 9 identify fair value hedge accounting as a distinct hedge accounting model for recognised assets, liabilities and firm commitments exposed to particular risks affecting profit or loss.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 39 and IFRS 9 identify cash flow hedge accounting as a separate hedge accounting model for exposures to variability in cash flows attributable to particular risks.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 39, IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedges of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
